title: Azurite/Bluewood Attached discography mods
description:
此模组是Azurite/Bluewood mods的附加模组
This mod is an add-on mod for Azurite/Bluewood mods
body:
# English

This mod is a side mod for Azurite/Bluewood mods, designed to enhance the gameplay experience by adding a variety of unique music discs. These discs are not just simple additions; they bring new life and atmosphere to your Minecraft world. Here are some of the key features and additions of this mod:

- **Exclusive Music Discs**: This mod introduces a collection of exclusive music discs that can be found or crafted in the game. Each disc features a unique soundtrack that can transform your gameplay experience.

- **Crafting and Obtaining**: Players can craft these discs using specific materials or find them as rare drops from certain mobs or in special locations. This adds an element of discovery and excitement to the game.

- **Enhanced Audio Experience**: The music discs are designed to provide an enhanced audio experience, with high-quality tracks that are sure to please any music lover. Each track is carefully selected to fit different gameplay scenarios.

- **Integration with Existing Content**: These discs are seamlessly integrated into the existing content of the Azurite/Bluewood mods, ensuring that they feel like a natural part of the game world.

- **Server and Client Compatibility**: This mod is designed to work seamlessly on both servers and clients. If the server has this mod installed, clients will also be able to install it without any issues.

This mod is a sequel to the Azurite/Bluewood mods, which had its workspace destroyed. Despite this setback, we have worked hard to bring you an even better experience with this new version. Whether you are a fan of the original or a new player looking for fresh content, this mod has something to offer everyone.

Acknowledgment list: Kimi AI, thank you for generating a mod profile for me.

# Chinese

这个模组是 Azurite/Bluewood mods 的附属模组，旨在通过添加一系列独特的音乐唱片来增强游戏体验。这些唱片不仅仅是简单的添加物，它们为你的《我的世界》带来了新的活力和氛围。以下是这个模组的一些主要功能和新增内容：

- **专属音乐唱片**：这个模组引入了一系列专属的音乐唱片，这些唱片可以在游戏中找到或合成。每张唱片都包含独特的音轨，可以彻底改变你的游戏体验。

- **合成与获取**：玩家可以使用特定的材料合成这些唱片，或者从某些怪物身上获得稀有掉落，甚至在特殊地点找到它们。这为游戏增添了发现和探索的乐趣。

- **增强的音频体验**：这些音乐唱片旨在提供增强的音频体验，高质量的音轨一定会让任何音乐爱好者感到满意。每首曲子都是精心挑选的，以适应不同的游戏场景。

- **与现有内容的整合**：这些唱片无缝集成到 Azurite/Bluewood mods 的现有内容中，确保它们感觉像是游戏世界中自然的一部分。

服务器和客户端的兼容性：这个模组被设计为在服务器和客户端上都能无缝运行。如果服务器安装了这个模组，客户端也能够轻松安装，无需担心兼容性问题。

鸣谢名单：kimi ai，感谢他给我生成模组简介。
